title: Trichambaram Temple
tagline: Trichambaram Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Trichambaram Temple is a Krishna temple located in Taliparamba, in the Kannur district of Kerala, South India.
overview.description: Trichambaram Temple is a Krishna temple located in Taliparamba, in the Kannur district of Kerala, South India. The main deity of the temple is Krishna after "Kamsavadham" sitting in His "Raudra" posture (ferocious posture). The Temple is among the Abhimana Kshethrams, which is a list of holy Vaishnavite shrines. The temple is also mentioned in the 11th century CE Sanskrit kāvya "Mūṣikavaṃśa".

topPlaces.name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, Taliparamba
topPlaces.description: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, Taliparamba Kendra (BVB Tpba) is a senior secondary school affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE), New Delhi. Established in 1999, it is a part of the Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, a group of India's premier educational institutions, and is situated in Mahatma Udyan, Taliparamba, Kannur District, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Taliparamba
topPlaces.description: Taliparamba (also known as Perinchelloor and Lakshmipuram) is a Municipality and Taluk of Kannur district in Kerala state, India. The municipal town spreads over an area of 18.96 square kilometres (7.32 sq mi) and is inhabited by 44,247 number of people.

topPlaces.name: Muyyam
topPlaces.description: Muyyam is a village located in the Kannur district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Poovam, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Poovam is a small village in Taliparamba Block in Kannur district of Kerala State, India. It comes under Kurumathur Panchayat and is near the Panniyoor Pepper Research Station, and 30 km north of District headquarters Kannur.

topPlaces.name: Rajarajeshwara Temple
topPlaces.description: The Rajarajeshwara Temple is a Hindu temple in Taliparamba, Kannur district, Kerala, India, dedicated to the Hindu deity Shiva. It is one of the 108 Shiva Temples of Kerala and one of the Dwadasha Shivalayam (12 important Shiva temples of ancient Kerala, stretching from Gokarnam to Kanyakumari).

topPlaces.name: Karimbam, Taliparamba
topPlaces.description: Velippara is a village located in Taliparamba town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It stretches from Government Hospital Karimbam to the neighboring villages of Panakkad and Varadool.

topPlaces.name: Kapalikulangara Sree Mahavishnu Temple
topPlaces.description: The Kapalikulangara Sree Mahavishnu Temple is located in Taliparamba, Kannur district, Kerala, India, near the Sree Rajarajeshwara temple.

topPlaces.name: Taliparamba West
topPlaces.description: Taliparamba West is a group of suburbs and villages on the north and west of Taliparamba town, Kerala state, India. The locality is divided into two parts, south and north; South Kuppam is a part of Taliparamba municipality while North Kuppam, near Mukkunnu, is a part of Pariyaram village Panchayath.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trichambaram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trichambaram Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Trichambaram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (116 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trichambaram Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trichambaram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trichambaram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Trichambaram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trichambaram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, Taliparamba, Taliparamba, Muyyam, Poovam, Kerala, Rajarajeshwara Temple.
